results.rule_description: S3 bucket should have versioning enabled
results.impact: Deleted or modified data would not be recoverable
results.description: Resource 'my-bucket' does not have versioning enabled

results.rule_description: S3 bucket encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
results.impact: Using AWS managed keys does not allow for fine-grained control
results.resolution: Enable encryption using a customer-managed key
results.description: Resource 'my-bucket' does not use a customer-managed key
